ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Due Tomorrow
ham.body:
Hey Team,

Just a friendly reminder that the semester project for CS301 is due tomorrow, 31st March 2026 at 11:59 PM. Please ensure you upload your final report to the portal and submit the presentation slides.

Agar koi doubt ho ya help chahiye, feel free to drop me a message.

Thanks,
Prof. Anil Gupta
Course Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Approval Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Student Name],

I am Dr. R. Sharma, the Principal Officer of the International Scholarship Office at XYZ University. Our records indicate that your application for the 2025 Merit Scholarship has been approved. However, to finalize the grant, we require a small processing fee of INR 8,000. Kindly transfer the amount at the earliest to secure your scholarship.

Please click the link below to proceed:

<URL>

Failure to complete the payment within 48 hours will result in cancellation of your scholarship award.

Best Regards,
Dr. R. Sharma
Principal Officer – Scholarship Office
XYZ University
